ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the organization is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., type 1, type 2, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the type (e.g., outpatient, inpatient, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_types_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the metric belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type the metric belongs to */,
  "attendances" INTEGER /* Number of attendances */,
  "breaches" INTEGER /* Number of breaches */,
  "admissions" INTEGER /* Number of admissions */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "metric_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES organization_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the target belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type the target belongs to */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of target (e.g., attendance, breach, admission) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year the target is set for */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the target */,
  "target_status" TEXT /* Current status of the target (e.g., in progress, achieved, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES organization_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target the progress belongs to */,
  "progress_year" INTEGER /* Year the progress is for */,
  "progress_value" INTEGER /* Progress value */,
  "progress_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, auditor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event (e.g., IP address, user agent, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "audit_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit event (e.g., changes made, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., read, unread, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., security, appearance, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
